info.name: CSAT Server API Collection
info.description:
Complete CSAT API including dashboard filters, statistics, aggregations, coverage tracking, and Admin APIs. 

## Historical Data Feature
- Pass `cycleId` query parameter to any filter/detail endpoint to get historical data
- For past cycles, SBU leadership, Brand details, and Client info are automatically enriched from History models
- Response objects include `_historical: true` flag when using historical data

## How it works:
1. Current cycle: Uses live entity data
2. Past cycles: Uses stored history IDs (brandHistoryId, clientHistoryId, sbuHistoryId) or falls back to cycle-based lookup

See docs/info.md for detailed architecture documentation.

request.description:
Get CSAT responses filtered by department. Pass cycleId for HISTORICAL data - SBU leadership will reflect that cycle's snapshot.

**CSAT Classification:**
- Good: >= 3.75
- Average: >= 3.0 and < 3.75
- Critical: < 3.0

CSV EXPORT: Add ?export=csv to download all data as CSV file (ignores pagination).

item.name: Admin - SBU Management
item.description: CRUD operations for SBUs with automatic history tracking

request.description: Get all SBUs with leadership info

query.description: Optional: Get historical data for specific cycle

request.description: Get SBU by ID. Pass cycleId to get historical snapshot.
Get all historical snapshots for an SBU across cycles

Create new SBU. When brands are linked via brandId, the brand's services array is automatically updated with the sbuId for the matching department. Supports: brandId (single or array), brands (array), associateVP (single), associateVPs (array).

Update SBU.

Supported fields:
- executiveVP: Update executive VP name
- associateVP: Add single AVP to existing list
- associateVPs: Replace entire AVPs array
- brands: Replace entire brands array (ideal for cycle changes)
- brandId: Append brand(s) to existing
- addBrands: Add specific brands
- removeBrands: Remove specific brands

When brands change, their services.sbuId is automatically updated.

item.name: Admin - Client Management
item.description: CRUD operations for Clients (POCs) with history tracking

request.description: Get all clients/POCs
Get client by ID. Pass cycleId for historical snapshot.
Get all historical snapshots for a client
Create new client/POC. brandId is required to link the client to a brand.
Update client/POC details. Can update name, phone, email, and serviceMapping (which departments this POC handles).

item.name: Admin - Brand Management
item.description: CRUD operations for Brands with history tracking

request.description: Get all brands

item.name: Get Brand by ID (with history + POCs)

request.description: Get brand with POCs. Pass cycleId for historical snapshot.
Get all historical snapshots for a brand

Create new brand. Pass 'departments' array (e.g., ['solutions', 'media', 'tech']) to create service entries with sbuId: null. When SBU is created later with this brand, the sbuId will be automatically populated. Valid departments: solutions, media, tech, seo, martech, fluence, smp.
Update brand details. Can update name, secondBrainId, and services array (department-SBU mappings).
Update the POCs (Points of Contact) associated with this brand. Pass array of Client IDs.

item.name: Admin - Cycle Management
item.description: Cycle lifecycle management including creation, updates, and history finalization

request.description: Get all cycles, optionally filtered by year

Create all 6 cycles for a year. Each year has 6 cycles (May-December): Cycle 1 (May), Cycle 2 (June-July), Cycle 3 (August), Cycle 4 (September-October), Cycle 5 (November), Cycle 6 (December). All cycles are created with status 'upcoming' by default.

Update cycle status and/or isActive flag.

Valid statuses: upcoming, active, closed, completed

NOTE: When setting status to 'active', all other active cycles will be automatically set to 'closed'.

Status Transitions:
- upcoming → active: Marks cycle as current
- active → closed: Closes the cycle
- closed → completed: Finalizes the cycle

query.description: Set to true to force re-finalization of already finalized cycles

request.description: IMPORTANT: Call this when a cycle ends. Creates BrandHistory, ClientHistory, SBUHistory snapshots and updates all CSATResponse documents with history IDs. Also marks cycle as completed. \n\nIDEMPOTENCY: This endpoint can only be called ONCE per cycle. If called again, returns 409 Conflict UNLESS force=true is passed.
